approval_queue_entries_action_metadata_c.name: approval_queue_entries_action_metadata_check
approval_queue_entries_action_metadata_c.value:
(
        "approval_queue_entries"."status" = 'pending'
        AND "approval_queue_entries"."reason" is null
        AND "approval_queue_entries"."acted_by_user_id" is null
        AND "approval_queue_entries"."acted_at" is null
      ) OR (
        "approval_queue_entries"."status" in ('sent_back', 'flagged')
        AND NULLIF(btrim("approval_queue_entries"."reason"), '') is not null
        AND "approval_queue_entries"."acted_by_user_id" is not null
        AND "approval_queue_entries"."acted_at" is not null
      )

drafts_date_order_check.name: drafts_date_order_check
drafts_date_order_check.value: "drafts"."effective_date" is null OR "drafts"."expiration_date" is null OR "drafts"."expiration_date" >= "drafts"."effective_date"

drafts_ipfs_push_metadata_check.name: drafts_ipfs_push_metadata_check
drafts_ipfs_push_metadata_check.value: ("drafts"."ipfs_pushed" = false AND "drafts"."ipfs_pushed_at" is null) OR ("drafts"."ipfs_pushed" = true AND "drafts"."ipfs_pushed_at" is not null)

policies_company_name_check.name: policies_company_name_check
policies_company_name_check.value: "policies"."company_name" is null OR ("policies"."company_name" = btrim("policies"."company_name") AND char_length("policies"."company_name") > 0)

policies_invoice_number_check.name: policies_invoice_number_check
policies_invoice_number_check.value: lower("policies"."transaction_type") NOT IN ('audit', 'endorsement') OR NULLIF(btrim("policies"."invoice_number"), '') is not null

policies_assignment_check.name: policies_assignment_check
policies_assignment_check.value:
("policies"."kaylee_split" = 'none' AND "policies"."producer_user_id" is null)
        OR ("policies"."kaylee_split" in ('book', 'house') AND "policies"."producer_user_id" is not null)

policies_money_nonnegative_check.name: policies_money_nonnegative_check
policies_money_nonnegative_check.value:
"policies"."base_premium" >= 0
        AND "policies"."taxes" >= 0
        AND "policies"."mga_fee" >= 0
        AND "policies"."broker_fee" >= 0
        AND "policies"."commission_amount" >= 0
        AND "policies"."amount_paid" >= 0
        AND "policies"."proposal_total" >= 0
        AND "policies"."net_due" >= 0
        AND "policies"."deposit_option" >= 0
        AND "policies"."finance_balance" >= 0

policies_commission_check.name: policies_commission_check
policies_commission_check.value:
(
        "policies"."commission_mode" = 'pct'
        AND "policies"."commission_rate" is not null
        AND "policies"."commission_rate" BETWEEN 0 AND 100
        AND "policies"."commission_amount" = round("policies"."base_premium" * "policies"."commission_rate" / 100, 2)
        AND ("policies"."base_premium" = 0 OR "policies"."commission_confirmed" = true)
      ) OR (
        "policies"."commission_mode" in ('tbd', 'na')
        AND "policies"."commission_rate" is null
        AND "policies"."commission_amount" = 0
        AND "policies"."commission_confirmed" = false
      )

policies_ipfs_state_check.name: policies_ipfs_state_check
policies_ipfs_state_check.value:
(
        "policies"."payment_mode" <> 'deposit'
        AND "policies"."ipfs_financed" is null
        AND "policies"."ipfs_manual" = false
        AND "policies"."ipfs_returning" is null
        AND "policies"."finance_contact" is null
        AND "policies"."finance_meta" is null
        AND "policies"."ipfs_pushed" = false
        AND "policies"."ipfs_pushed_at" is null
      ) OR (
        "policies"."payment_mode" = 'deposit'
        AND "policies"."ipfs_financed" = 'no'
        AND "policies"."ipfs_manual" = false
        AND "policies"."ipfs_returning" is null
        AND "policies"."finance_contact" is null
        AND "policies"."finance_meta" is null
        AND "policies"."ipfs_pushed" = false
        AND "policies"."ipfs_pushed_at" is null
      ) OR (
        "policies"."payment_mode" = 'deposit'
        AND "policies"."ipfs_financed" = 'yes'
        AND "policies"."finance_meta" is not null
        AND (
          "policies"."ipfs_manual" = true
          OR ("policies"."ipfs_returning" is not null AND "policies"."finance_contact" is not null)
        )
        AND (
          ("policies"."ipfs_pushed" = false AND "policies"."ipfs_pushed_at" is null)
          OR (
            "policies"."ipfs_manual" = false
            AND "policies"."ipfs_pushed" = true
            AND "policies"."ipfs_pushed_at" is not null
          )
        )
      )

policies_mga_paid_state_check.name: policies_mga_paid_state_check
policies_mga_paid_state_check.value:
("policies"."mga_paid" = false AND "policies"."mga_paid_at" is null)
        OR ("policies"."mga_paid" = true AND "policies"."mga_paid_at" is not null)

policies_receivable_status_check.name: policies_receivable_status_check
policies_receivable_status_check.value:
("policies"."receivable_status" = 'paid' AND "policies"."collected_to_date" = "policies"."premium_total")
        OR ("policies"."receivable_status" = 'open' AND "policies"."premium_total" > 0 AND "policies"."collected_to_date" = 0)
        OR ("policies"."receivable_status" = 'partial'
          AND "policies"."collected_to_date" > 0
          AND "policies"."collected_to_date" < "policies"."premium_total")

policies_payable_status_check.name: policies_payable_status_check
policies_payable_status_check.value:
("policies"."payable_status" = 'paid' AND "policies"."remitted_to_mga" = "policies"."net_due_total")
        OR ("policies"."payable_status" = 'unpaid' AND "policies"."net_due_total" > 0 AND "policies"."remitted_to_mga" = 0)
        OR ("policies"."payable_status" = 'partially_remitted'
          AND "policies"."remitted_to_mga" > 0
          AND "policies"."remitted_to_mga" < "policies"."net_due_total")
